title:
Vocational rehabilitation services
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Vocational rehabilitation services
Kia ora - I am a principal advisor with TEC working in the careers space. As TEC is kaitiaki of the careers system strategy, we are pulling together a list of services relating to careers including the reach of these services. I was wondering if ACC kept a database on vocational rehabilitation services - in particular, a number of people who would access Voc Rehab each year.
This may not be a data file requirement but if it were, it would give us (TEC) an idea of the reach of Voc Rehab services in NZ, and how we can better support CDANZ membership who run these services with resources for our Tahatu career navigator website (replacing careers.govt.nz).
As above - this data may already exist just under a different category than vocational rehab.

### Response from Accident Compensation Corporation
Status Dataset submitted
Comments 27 May 2025
Kia ora, 

Our reference: GOV-040076. 
Please find attached our response to your request dated 13 May 2025, here: https://catalogue.data.govt.nz/dataset/gov-040076-acc-data-on-vocational-rehabilitation-services

Ngā mihi

Christopher Johnston, Manager Official Information Act Services, 
Government Engagement

#### Likely Source Agency
Accident Compensation Corporation
